user.title: TruLight BLE Controller
user.description:
Configure a TruLight BLE LED controller via ESPHome proxy.

You need an ESP32 running the TruLight BLE proxy ESPHome firmware that exposes a text command entity and power on/off button entities.

data_description.name: A friendly name for this TruLight controller (e.g., Backyard, Front)
data_description.command_entity: The ESPHome text entity that accepts hex commands
data_description.power_on_entity: The ESPHome button entity that turns the controller on
data_description.power_off_entity: The ESPHome button entity that turns the controller off

error.entity_not_found: Entity not found. Make sure the ESPHome device is online.

abort.already_configured: This TruLight controller is already configured.
